channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cancer drug shortage prompts renewed calls for federal action
item.description: Cancer doctors across the United States are facing shortages of essential generic chemotherapy drugs, raising concerns about potential widespread rationing.

item.title: H. pylori screening could yield fivefold return in gastric cancer prevention
item.description: Each unit of cost invested in Helicobacter pylori screening can generate approximately a fivefold return in gastric cancer prevention benefits.

item.title: Specialized procedure restores young woman's ability to walk
item.description: Through interdepartmental collaboration, a young woman's quality of life and ability to walk were restored after laparoscopic removal of a rare tumor.

item.title: Patient involvement and the future of clinical research [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Most clinical research treats patients like data points, but what gets lost in that approach?
